text:
NAME: HOSP_AT_HOME_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field was new in 2021. 

This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount associated with the 
revenue center code 0161 from all claim records included in the stay.
